---
title: "Week 10: Metaprogramming"
summary: "Work with non-standard evaluation, abstract syntax trees, tidyselect, and code generation safely."
prepare: "Read the metaprogramming chapters in Advanced R before the workshop."
resource_label: "Advanced R metaprogramming"
resource_url: "https://adv-r.hadley.nz/metaprogramming.html"
focus:
  - "Non-standard evaluation"
  - "Abstract syntax trees and expressions"
  - "Symbols, calls, and quosures"
  - "Parsing, evaluation, and code safety"
---

```{r}
week <- 10
source(here::here("course_info.R"))
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_week_overview(week)
```

## Main reference

* [17-20 *Advanced R*](https://adv-r.hadley.nz/metaprogramming.html)

## What you will learn this week

* Design
* Non-standard evaluation (changing the expression or environment)
* Abstract syntax trees
* tidyselect
* Symbols, expressions, quosures (names, calls, calls+environments)
* Parsing and evaluating code
* Code safety from injection attacks

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_slides(week)
```


```{r}
#| output: asis
show_assignments(week)
```
